title: Y@riyah #3404
definition:
Jerijah or Jeriah = " taught by Jehovah"

 1) a Kohathite Levite and chief of the house of Hebron when David
    organised the service
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jerijah or Jeriah = " taught by Jehovah"

 1) a Kohathite Levite and chief of the house of Hebron when David
    organised the service

    NASB:  Yah will throw, a Levite
